articles.full_text:
Heavy rainfall and heatwave to severe heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
IMD has issued heavy rainfall and heatwave warning for several states/UTs for Thursday. Heavy rainfall is likely over Andaman & Nicobar Islands, Assam, Meghalaya, Kerala, Puducherry, West Bengal, Sikkim and Tamil Nadu. Heatwave to severe heatwave is likely over Chhattisgarh, Haryana, Chandigarh, Delhi, Odisha, Punjab, Rajasthan, Telangana, Uttarakhand, Andhra Pradesh, MP, UP and Maharashtra.
